title: Nadi Shodhana
author: Yoga
description: Alternate nostril breathing (Nadi Shodhana Pranayama). Bring your right hand to your nose and form Vishnu Mudra: fold your index and middle fingers toward your palm, keeping your thumb, ring finger, and little finger extended. 8-second rhythm.

steps.label: Prepare
steps.text: Form Vishnu Mudra with your right hand. Both nostrils pulled open.
Both nostrils pulled open with ring finger and thumb
Both nostrils pulled open with ring finger and thumb

sequence.text: Right nostril only — close left with ring finger
Left nostril only — close right with thumb
Left nostril only — close left with ring finger
Right nostril only — close left with ring finger

steps.text: Both nostrils pulled open with ring finger and thumb
Both nostrils pulled open with ring finger and thumb
